meta.title: Unit 1 — Singular & Plural Nouns (Test 9)
meta.subject: English Grammar
meta.description: Review test: singular and plural nouns with all question types.

questions.question: What is the plural of "bike"?
questions.explanation: bike → bikes. Regular nouns add -s.

questions.question: "Kites" is the plural of "kite".
questions.explanation: Yes! kite → kites. Regular nouns add -s.

questions.question: Write the plural of "glass".
questions.explanation: glass → glasses. Words ending in -ss add -es.

questions.question: I open my ___ to page 8. (book — only one)
questions.explanation: "my [one] book" uses the singular form: book.

questions.question: The plural of "watch" is "watches".
questions.explanation: Yes! watch ends in -ch, so watch → watches (add -es).

questions.question: Write the plural of "class".
questions.explanation: class → classes. Words ending in -ss add -es.

questions.question: Which sentence uses the correct plural form?
options: She find ten shell on the beach.
She finds ten shell on the beach.
She finds ten shells on the beach.
She finds ten shelles on the beach.
questions.explanation: shell → shells. "ten" tells us we need a plural.

questions.question: Sort these words: Singular or Plural?
questions.explanation: bike/kite/shell = one (singular). glasses/classes = more than one (plural).

questions.question: Arrange the words to form a correct sentence:
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Luke and Ella ride their bikes home."

questions.question: "Stars" is the plural of "star".
questions.explanation: Yes! star → stars. Regular nouns add -s.

questions.question: Write the plural of "bag".
questions.explanation: bag → bags. Regular nouns add -s.

questions.question: Which plural is formed with -es?
questions.explanation: branch ends in -ch, so branch → branches (add -es).

questions.question: Sort these plurals: did they add -s or -es?
questions.explanation: Regular nouns add -s. Nouns ending in -ch or -ss add -es.

questions.question: In the sentence "My friend and I have two bags," the noun is the correct plural.
questions.explanation: bags is the correct plural of bag (add -s). "two" tells us we need a plural.

questions.question: Arrange the words to form a correct sentence:
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Mom buys seven apples."

questions.question: Write the plural of "box".
questions.explanation: box → boxes. Words ending in -x add -es.

questions.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Roy drinks two glass of juice.
Roy drinks two glases of juice.
Roy drinks two glasses of juice.
Roy drinks two glassies of juice.
questions.explanation: glass → glasses (add -es). "two" tells us we need a plural.

questions.question: Which word ends in -s and needs -es for plural?
questions.explanation: bus ends in -s, so bus → buses (add -es).

questions.question: In the sentence "She has three boxes," the plural is formed incorrectly.
questions.explanation: boxes is the correct plural of box (add -es). The sentence is correct.

questions.question: Write the plural of "brush".
questions.explanation: brush → brushes. Words ending in -sh add -es.
